text.title: User Control and Freedom Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the user-control-freedom methodology end-to-end.

step.name: action-inventory
step.input: Code grep / DOM snapshots / PM-supplied feature list.
step.action: Enumerate every state-changing or destructive action with route + reversibility tag.

step.name: static-control-check
step.action: For each action record undo_available, cancel_available, exit_mechanism, recovery_method.

step.name: focus-trap-verify
step.action: Run templates/verify-escape-exits.spec.js (Playwright); set focus_trap_verified=true on pass.
step.decision-gate: If verification fails, block the artefact with a fix_direction listing failing modals.

step.name: severity-rate
step.action: Apply severity: irreversible-no-undo-no-confirm = 1; missing modal exit = 2; confirmation-on-routine = 1 for fatigue; OK = 0.

step.name: fix-direction-and-validate
step.action: Write concrete fix_direction per row; run scripts/validate-user-control-freedom.py; flag "ready for owner review".
